title: Prime
description: A prime number is a natural number which has exactly two distinct natural number divisors: 1 and itself. The first prime number is 2. Can you write a program that computes the nth prime number, given a number n ≤ 10000?
input: The input contains just one number which is the number n as described above. The maximum value of n is 10000.
output: The output consists of a single integer that is the nth prime number.
source: Olympiad, National Olympiad in Informatics (Singapore), NOI 2008
